subject: [CCSDK] Add hardcoded dgbuilder certificates
commit_message:
[CCSDK] Add hardcoded dgbuilder certificates

Add hard coded certificate for CCSDK dgbuilder (design time tool)

Issue-ID: CCSDK-2541
Signed-off-by: Dan Timoney <dtimoney@att.com>
Change-Id: I9fe61a1bdf17cbdf22a3d518ded27582e86c2c07

Description: 'Release "onap-sdnc" failed: secrets "onap-dgbuilder-certs" already

Patch Set 3:

Patch Set 3:

Build Started https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-frankfurt-verify-helm/140/ (2/2)

Patch Set 3: Code-Review+1

> Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1
> 
> Hello Dan, I know it's a WIP but as I was looking for the resutls, here's the issue:
> 
> Description: 'Release "onap-sdnc" failed: secrets "onap-dgbuilder-certs" already

Thanks!  I found and fixed the problem (SDNC and APPC both start their own instances of dgbuilder, so I had to include {.Release.Name} as part of the secret name / uid to avoid collision).  I tested that change in my local env and that seems to address the problem.
